summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Download PDF Report feature for ROI Calculator. All functionality working perfectly including button styling, loading states, PDF generation, and existing calculator features.
passed_tests: Download PDF button visible in header with coral accent color
Button shows proper loading state with 'Generating...' text when clicked
PDF generation works successfully using html2pdf.js library
Button returns to normal state after PDF generation
All calculator sliders function properly (activations, sampled, conversion, price, units)
Real-time calculations update when slider values change
All metric cards display correct calculated values
Sprint cost updates correctly based on activation count
No JavaScript errors or console warnings
